---
name: Skill / Capability Proposal
description: Propose a new agent skill or a major API guide update.
title: "[PROPOSAL] "
labels: ["enhancement", "proposal"]
---

**Core Goal**
What specific capabilities or guidelines will this new skill provide to developer agents?

**API / Source Material**
*   Target SDK / Framework: (e.g. Microsoft Agent Framework `Microsoft.Agents.AI` for Python, Claude Agent SDK, an MCP server API)
*   Latest Stable Version: (e.g., v1.12.0)
*   Ground-truth source: (official binaries/packages, executable spec, or reference docs, claims must be verifiable, see CONTRIBUTING)

**Staged Files Proposal**
*   Skill Namespace: (e.g. `skills/maf-architect-python`, `skills/mcp-server-design`)
*   Will it contain versioned references? (Yes / No)
*   Will it contain helper scripts / private plugins? (Yes / No)

**Example Usage Prompt**
How would a user prompt their agent to trigger this skill?
*(e.g., "Design a MAF workflow where three reviewer agents analyze a contract in parallel and a human approval port gates the final send-out.")*
